title: rhododendron × mizumotoi
intro: Rhododendron × mizumotoi, also known as the Yaku Rhododendron, is a hybrid plant species within the rhododendron family, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and evergreen foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds that have been used in traditional Japanese medicine. The health benefits of Rhododendron × mizumotoi include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic to aid in wound healing. Rhododendron × mizumotoi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Japanese herbal remedies.
